task_completion.description: Open the original side.slvs tutorial file in SolveSpace
task_completion.visual_evidence: SolveSpace application is open and the 3D view displays the initial part. The window title or property browser should indicate 'side.slvs'.

task_completion.description: Draw a circle on the main face of the part
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 2D sketch of a circle is visible on the main flat face of the 3D part.

task_completion.description: Constrain the circle to a 5.0 mm diameter (or 2.5 mm radius)
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dimension constraint showing '5.0' (diameter) or '2.5' (radius) is visibly attached to the sketched circle in the 3D view.

task_completion.description: Apply the Step Translating feature to the circle
task_completion.visual_evidence: Multiple copies of the circle appear in a linear pattern, or a 'Step Translating' group is visible in the SolveSpace property browser.

task_completion.description: Configure the array to have 4 copies with a 32 mm translation distance
task_completion.visual_evidence: Exactly 4 copies of the circle are visible in the linear array. A distance constraint of '32' is visible between the copies, or the property browser shows 4 repeats and a 32mm translation.

task_completion.description: Save the modified file as side_with_holes.slvs in the expected directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog is visible showing the path '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/side_with_holes.slvs', or the SolveSpace window title updates to 'side_with_holes.slvs'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the SolveSpace graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SolveSpace GUI being actively used (menus, toolbars, property browser), rather than terminal commands modifying the file directly.

integrity.description: The agent manually created the sketch and applied the pattern.
integrity.visual_evidence: Intermediate steps of drawing the circle, applying constraints, and setting up the step translation are visible, proving the file wasn't simply downloaded or copied.

integrity.description: The file was saved using the application's save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'File -> Save As' menu or dialog is used to save the file, rather than a terminal 'cp' or 'mv' command.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source file is '/opt/solvespace_samples/side.slvs'. The agent must draw a circle with a 5.0 mm diameter (2.5 mm radius). The 'Step Translating' feature must be used to create exactly 4 copies. The translation distance between copies must be 32 mm in the horizontal (+X) direction. The final file must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/side_with_holes.slvs'.
